title: eml-ice40-cybenko: code and data for Valid and False Snapping in EML Expression Trees
description: Code (eml_layer_v2.py, experiment_v2.py), paper source, and the full 240-run results CSV for the paper 'Valid and False Snapping in EML Expression Trees: The Basin Selection Problem'. Includes 238 completed training runs (20 seeds x 3 functions x 4 depths, minus 2 NaN divergences) with pre-snap loss, post-snap loss, snapped symbolic form, and valid-snap label for each run. Figure 1 heatmap included.
